response.overview: The intergalactic hero “Heartthrob” is facing his toughest battle yet against his arch-nemesis, “Blue Ball.” Just as the fight reaches a critical juncture, Heartthrob is interrupted by a call from his husband, “Beloved,” who is furious that he left during their intimate moment to save the galaxy. Heartthrob insists on his dedication to his responsibilities as a hero, but his resolve begins to waver when he sees the special gift Beloved has prepared for him: a seductive lingerie set.
response.title: I'm About To <3
